mnemonics: EVERY VEGETABLE GAS COSTS MORE (EVM, Validators, Gas, Cryptocurrency, Mining/Proof-of-Stake)
keyPoints: The Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM) is the global, decentralized computer that executes smart contracts.
Ether (ETH) is the native cryptocurrency used to pay for transaction fees and computational services (gas).
The network is secured by validators who stake ETH to participate in consensus via Proof-of-Stake (PoS).
commonMistakes: Confusing gas (the fee) with gas limit (the maximum amount of gas you're willing to spend).
Thinking Ether is just a currency; its primary purpose is to pay for network operation, not just as digital cash.
